remarks: Nestled in a peaceful brook-side setting, this custom-built home, located at 19 Brookhill Ln in Norwalk, is a private retreat featuring two decks, native landscaping, and thoughtfully designed, low-maintenance grounds with a micro-irrigation system. Spanning 3,700 square feet, this unfurnished contemporary colonial features three bedrooms, three bathrooms, a private office, a den, and a dining room among other spaces with hardwood floors, dual fireplaces, and a custom lighting package that creates warm, sophisticated living spaces throughout. The newly renovated kitchen showcases premium European appliances, quartz countertops, and an island with seating for three. The luxurious primary suite includes a cedar-lined walk-in closet and a newly renovated bathroom. A circular crushed-stone driveway provides an elegant arrival, with a separate entrance leading to an oversized two-car garage featuring custom built-in cabinetry for storage. Set on a quiet, walkable street, this distinctive rental offers the privacy of a country estate with the comfort and conveniences of everyday urban living.
